patterns.name: Query Gateway repository
patterns.evidence: TaskRegisterGatewayRepository builds parameterized SELECT TOP queries and maps rows to DuplicateDocIdTarget. Loosefruit should follow same repository shape using DocID LIKE '%[_]%'.

patterns.name: Duplicate cleanup fetch worker
patterns.evidence: DuplicateFetchWorker and TaskRegisterFetchWorker use QObject + QThread + completed/failed signals; Loosefruit fetch should follow this pattern.

patterns.name: Shared duplicate target table
patterns.evidence: Task Register reuses duplicate_table with DuplicateDocIdTarget rows, then run_duplicate_cleanup builds RunPayload. Loosefruit can reuse table and event update path with source/category detection.

patterns.name: Browser delete runner
patterns.evidence: runner/src/orchestration/delete-loosefruit-runner.ts already supports operation delete_loosefruit, uses saved BrowserSession, searchLoosefruitByDocId, detail validation, delete, and post-delete absence verification.

dependencies: requests for Query Gateway HTTP client
Playwright runner package for Plantware browser deletion
Saved Plantware session files per LocCode when loginFallback=false

integration_points.contract: Fetch all-location Loosefruit targets, render as duplicate targets, validate sessions by LocCode, start RunPayload(operation='delete_loosefruit').
Process Loosefruit targets across one or many LocCode groups, emit loosefruit.* events with doc_id/status/message.
Unit tests cover SQL, mapping, UI payload, session validation, and runner loc grouping.

conflict_areas: app/core/loosefruit_gateway.py exists but appears incomplete/truncated in current worktree; importing it may break tests until fixed.
app/core/task_register_gateway.py already contains LoosefruitGatewayRepository and LoosefruitDuplicateDocId, creating duplicate ownership with app/core/loosefruit_gateway.py.

Prior lite-plan session .workflow/.lite-plan/loosefruit-duplicate-delete-2026-05-31 contains conflicting direction: direct SQL delete vs browser runner delete. Current plan uses SQL SELECT for targets and existing browser runner for delete to preserve Plantware behavior.
runDeleteLoosefruit currently rejects multiple LocCode values. User request requires all-location cleanup, so runner or UI must group by LocCode.
constraints: Use the user-provided SELECT semantics: PR_LOOSEFRUIT rows where DocID LIKE '%[_]%'.
Empty LocCode filter means all locations.
Do not raw DELETE from db_ptrj unless user explicitly confirms bypassing Plantware UI side effects.
Dry run remains default and destructive delete requires confirmation.
Do not overwrite unrelated dirty worktree changes. Stop on file conflicts.
recommended_tasks: IMPL-1: Stabilize Loosefruit gateway and mapping.
IMPL-2: Support all-location Loosefruit runner grouping and events.
IMPL-3: Add proper Duplicate Cleanup UI layout and Loosefruit controls.
IMPL-4: Add tests, docs, and verification.
